DEFENDANT THE NORMANDY IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY DAVID KIMMEL, PARTNER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT THE NORMANDY

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PACIFICA, FELICIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT THE NORMANDY PLAINTIFF'S APARTMENT IS LOCATED WITHIN A MULTIUNIT APARTMENT COMPLEX. INTERMITTENT AND SOMETIMES FREQUENT CONDITIONS EMANATING FROM NEIGHBORING APARTMENT UNITS RESULTED FROM THE ORDINARY AND LAWFUL USE OF THE PROPERTY, ARE PART OF THE ORDINARY URBAN LIVING ENVIRONMENT AND DO NOT CONSTITUTE ACTIONABLE NUISANCE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
